info.title: Kickflip
info.description: Kick those GIT changes and flip them over to that remote server

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: ArgumentExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: OptionExtensions.Parse, OK: Parser.Parse, OK: ParserExtensions.Parse, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParseResultExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: ParserExtensions.Invoke, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: CommandExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParseResultExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: ParserExtensions.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Plan and execute deployment to the remote server based on changes made in git since the last release (tag)

commands.name: deploy
commands.description: Kick your git changes and flip them over to that remote server!

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to the folder containing the git repository for Git based deployment modes or the folder to use in folder deployment. The path is an absolute path. [default: <path>]

commands.name: github
commands.description: Integration with github to allow kickflip to work in your existing Github workflow.

commands.name: pull-request
commands.description: Adds a comment to the pull request with the changes that will be deployed to the remote server.

arguments.name: local-path
arguments.description: Local path to the folder containing the git repository. The local path is an absolute path. [default: <path>]
